ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., Powerlifting, Weightlifting) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the competition (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website or page for the competition */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the organizers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifters" (
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the lifter */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the lifter (M/F) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the lifter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lifter */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the lifter in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Current weight of the lifter in kg */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the lifter */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region of the lifter */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the lifter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lifter */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the lifter's trainer */,
  "trainer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the trainer */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the lifter has */,
  "past_competitions" TEXT /* A list of past competitions the lifter has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight class (e.g., 59kg, 66kg, 74kg, etc.) */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class in kg */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for the weight class */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for the weight class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the weight class is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the division */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the division is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifting_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "is_team_event" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the event is a team event */,
  "is_individual_event" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the event is an individual event */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the event is currently active */,
  "scoring_rules" TEXT /* Description of the scoring rules for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "lifter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifter */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the lifter registered for the competition */,
  "entry_fee_paid" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the entry fee has been paid */,
  "entry_fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the entry fee */,
  "medical_certificate" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if a medical certificate is provided */,
  "waiver_signed" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the waiver has been signed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_entries_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_entries_lifter_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifter_id") REFERENCES lifters ("lifter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_entries_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_entries_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attempt1_kg" REAL /* Attempt 1 weight in kg */,
  "attempt2_kg" REAL /* Attempt 2 weight in kg */,
  "attempt3_kg" REAL /* Attempt 3 weight in kg */,
  "best_lift_kg" REAL /* Best lift weight in kg */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight lifted in the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the lifter in the event */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the result is valid (e.g., no disqualifications) */,
  "judge_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the judges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifting_results_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES competition_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifting_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lifting_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, lifter) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the competition data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)
